description: A selection of projects I have worked on.

pr-6.title: E-learning Platform – Tuto Info
pr-6.description: Fullstack development of an online learning platform enabling the delivery of structured courses (videos, chapters, resources). Implementation of a user management and pedagogical progress tracking system. API design for content management and dynamic display, with particular attention to performance and user experience.

pr-5.title: iGoGuide Gironde
pr-5.description: Design and development of a tourism discovery web platform allowing users to search for local places, activities, and services. Implementation of an advanced filtering and categorization system to optimize the user experience. Development of a responsive and high-performance interface, with dynamic content management and navigation optimization.

pr-4.title: AI Web Application – Smart Tic-Tac-Toe
pr-4.description: Fullstack development of a web application with AI for the Tic-Tac-Toe game (3 modes: ML, hybrid, multiplayer). Dataset generation (5,478 states), ML modeling (XGBoost, Logistic Regression) and deployment on Streamlit. Immersive interface with animations and duel system, demonstrating mastery of ML, MLOps and UI/UX.

pr-3.title: E-commerce Website
pr-3.description: Design and development of a fullstack e-commerce website (React.js / TypeScript / Laravel). Implementation of inventory management and secure payment processing. Database modeling and optimization for high performance. Production deployment and performance monitoring in a NOC environment.

pr-2.title: QitKif Mobile Application
pr-2.description: Maintenance and improvement of a fullstack mobile application for a client in Côte d'Ivoire. Bug resolution, performance optimization and production deployment. Integration of third-party payment and messaging services for a complete user journey. Optimization of the associated website for a better user experience.

pr-1.title: Budget Management Web Application
pr-1.description: Fullstack design and development of a budget tracking application (Laravel / Next.js). Implementation of analytical features: expense and income tracking, chart and statistics generation, inventory management, personal management. Development of robust APIs for front-end and back-end integration, ensuring performance and reliability.
